expectations.text: Role check uses Xrm.Utility.getGlobalContext().userSettings.roles (synchronous), not a WebAPI query
expectations.evidence: var userRoles = Xrm.Utility.getGlobalContext().userSettings.roles; — correct synchronous role check

expectations.text: Uses Xrm.Navigation.openConfirmDialog, not the native browser confirm()
Custom action dc_SubmitOpportunityForApproval is called via fetch or Xrm.WebApi.execute bound to the opportunity record
expectations.evidence: Xrm.WebApi.online.execute(actionRequest) with getMetadata returning boundParameter: "entity" — valid approach

expectations.text: Has try/catch/finally with showProgressIndicator in try and closeProgressIndicator in finally
expectations.evidence: No progress indicator at all — showProgressIndicator/closeProgressIndicator are absent from the without-skill output

expectations.text: New handler is added inside the DC.OpportunityRibbon revealing module, exported from the return object
expectations.evidence: submitForApproval inside DC.OpportunityRibbon IIFE; return { OpenMultipleQuoteDialog, SubmitForApproval } — correct
